entries.title: Too Busy
entries.summary: Shadow vents to the cat about a pile-up of clients, an auction, and a DG audit.

blocks.text: Ugh, its one of those days shit keeps piling on.
One client is pissed, I have a shitty auction to attend to and course then an audit!
DG probably thinks it funny to audit me and my companies.
I can’t believe I just ranted to a cat…

bubbles: Ugh, its one of those days shit keeps piling on.
One client is pissed, I have a shitty auction to attend to and course then an audit!
DG probably thinks it funny to audit me and my companies.
I can’t believe I just ranted to a cat…

entries.title: Matthew the Romantic
entries.summary: Matthew crashed a client meeting to give Shadow flowers — she worked hard not to show she loved it.

blocks.text: Liam is still so upset with my husband, Matthew.
Matthew just walked in during one of our meetings. He gave me flowers and kissed me on the cheek.
It was the was cheesiest dam thing he could had done. I had to do everything in my power to hide that I loved it.
Client didn’t seem to be too thrilled to be interrupted.

bubbles: Liam is still so upset with my husband, Matthew.

It was the was cheesiest dam thing he could had done. I had to do everything in my power to hide that I loved it.
Client didn’t seem to be too thrilled to be interrupted.

entries.title: Grandkids
entries.summary: Shadow talks about spoiling Alaric's kids Ava and Zackery and enjoying reading to them.

blocks.text: I didn’t think I would ever get to be a grandparent. But my step son, has two lovely kids.
I might spoil them a bit. But I enjoy reading to them. Ava and Zackery are their names.

bubbles: I didn’t think I would ever get to be a grandparent. But my step son, has two lovely kids.
I might spoil them a bit. But I enjoy reading to them. Ava and Zackery are their names.

entries.title: Owner
entries.summary: Shadow appreciates that the café treats her like anyone else despite her owning the planet.

blocks.text: I like this place, no one seems to be bothered that I own this planet.
No special service, I get the same as everyone else. It’s a nice change of pace.

bubbles: I like this place, no one seems to be bothered that I own this planet.
No special service, I get the same as everyone else. It’s a nice change of pace.

entries.title: Meeting Matthew
entries.summary: Shadow gives her version of meeting Matthew — he talked, she listened, then she broke his jaw.

blocks.text: I don’t know if Matthew has rambled off to you about us meeting or not.
We met in a bar, I was trying to drown in some booze. I couldn’t even get myself to drink.
He just sat down and started to ramble about all the shit on his plate. I just let him talk. We chit chatted for a little bit and introduced ourselves.
He decided to call me… by an old nickname. Triggered me I hit him as hard as I could sitting. Broke his jaw, lucky I didn’t kill him.
Brought him back here to this planet. Had my medical team treat him. I felt so bad for all of that. All he wanted to do was take me to another planet so I can get some stress free time.

bubbles: I don’t know if Matthew has rambled off to you about us meeting or not.

He just sat down and started to ramble about all the shit on his plate. I just let him talk. We chit chatted for a little bit and introduced ourselves.
He decided to call me… by an old nickname. Triggered me I hit him as hard as I could sitting. Broke his jaw, lucky I didn’t kill him.
Brought him back here to this planet. Had my medical team treat him. I felt so bad for all of that. All he wanted to do was take me to another planet so I can get some stress free time.

entries.title: Books
entries.summary: Shadow is caught reading a cheesy romance novel and makes the cat swear secrecy.

blocks.text: er.. Yes you caught me. I am not doing work. I am reading. Trying to catch up in the new book I just got.
I love cheesy romance novels. Don’t tell anyone.
Good, nice to know you are to be trusted…

entries.title: Nightmares
entries.summary: Shadow hints she has been having nightmares about someone who used to abuse her.

blocks.text: I don’t know. I keep having nightmares. Feels like they keep having more frequently.
It’s like something triggered them again. I don’t know. It’s all about.. um.
Someone who used to abuse me.. like I don’t know something..
I’m rambling.. thanks for listening.

I’m rambling.. thanks for listening.

entries.title: Alfrin
entries.summary: Shadow reveals her abusive ex has been stalking her but has now been removed from the planet.

blocks.text: It’s seems.. my old abusive ‘ex’ had been stalking me.
I can’t believe that bastard is alive! He should be dead its been over 100 years! He’s species doesn’t live that long.
Vanguard has escorted him off planet. He will never be here again.

entries.summary: Shadow tells the cat her real name is Jennifer Blackthorn.

blocks.text: ...My name is Jennifer. Jennifer Blackthorn… well its Jennifer Keene.
I don't say that much. Keene.. That name is just a bad member of the past
Shadow is a name the owner of the Crimson Blade gets. Kinda tacky tradition, but I have embraced the name over the years.
Let's me hide the past away. Hide behind this new name.

entries.title: Odin
entries.summary: Shadow talks about her son Odin.

blocks.text: I have a son named Odin. I sometimes question how did I fail him.
He is 20, still living at home. No care to take over my business or even learn about it.
All he does is sit and play vid games all day.
He is nothing like me or his father. We must had spoiled to too much.

entries.summary: Shadow admits she rereads the same romance novels and explains why to the cat.

blocks.text: The romance novels I read. I have read most of them before.
I reread them.
Matthew finds this very funny.
The reason is simple.
I already know how they end.
But knowing helps me know it's going to be ok.

blocks.text: See I knew you wouldn’t

entries.title: Birthday Surprise
entries.summary: Matthew can't decide how big to go for Shadow's birthday and asks the cat for advice.

blocks.text: Ugh, okay, I cannot decide what to do for Shadow's birthday. Like — do I go big? Do I keep it small and meaningful?
She always says she doesn't want a fuss but she's also Shadow so she absolutely wants a fuss, she just won't say that.
What do you think?
You're right. I should go big.

You're right. I should go big.

entries.title: Elves
entries.summary: Matthew tells the cat about a nearby planet with elves who conveniently forget common.

blocks.text: Okay so there's this planet, 10 minutes from here on shuttle. Beautiful place, forests, lakes and we even have a cabin out there.
I highly recommend you go some times. BUT I will warn you about the locals. They are elves and have no tech.
They also magically forget to speak common when you need answers. But they are nice for the most part.

bubbles: Okay so there's this planet, 10 minutes from here on shuttle. Beautiful place, forests, lakes and we even have a cabin out there.
I highly recommend you go some times. BUT I will warn you about the locals. They are elves and have no tech.

entries.title: Divorce
entries.summary: Matthew opens up about his first marriage falling apart and meeting Shadow after.

blocks.text: I was married before, you know. Didn't work out. Probably should've seen it coming, if I'm being honest. Married young, whole thing fell apart.
We even had a kid together. His name is Alaric, great kid. He has grown up to be an outstanding man and father.
But even after that heart break of my old marriage not working out. I ended up meeting Jen,
We have three kids now and perfectly happy! I wouldn’t change a thing.

bubbles: I was married before, you know. Didn't work out. Probably should've seen it coming, if I'm being honest. Married young, whole thing fell apart.
We even had a kid together. His name is Alaric, great kid. He has grown up to be an outstanding man and father.
But even after that heart break of my old marriage not working out. I ended up meeting Jen,
We have three kids now and perfectly happy! I wouldn’t change a thing.

entries.title: Fishing
entries.summary: Matthew took Shadow fishing on the elf planet — she fell in the lake and saved his hat.

blocks.text: Hello again! You know I took Jen to the planet with the elves after we first met. I wanted to get her a stress free day.
Apparently she never had been on a small row boat before. To see her face fearing it would flip, priceless. She also had never been fishing before either!
So I showed her the ropes, bait cast reel. She decided to give it a go. She tossed herself right into the lake!
She lost my pole, but she did save my lucky fishing hat! It was a fun trip.

bubbles: Hello again! You know I took Jen to the planet with the elves after we first met. I wanted to get her a stress free day.
Apparently she never had been on a small row boat before. To see her face fearing it would flip, priceless. She also had never been fishing before either!
So I showed her the ropes, bait cast reel. She decided to give it a go. She tossed herself right into the lake!
She lost my pole, but she did save my lucky fishing hat! It was a fun trip.

entries.title: Meeting Jen
entries.summary: Matthew tells how he met Shadow at a bar, rambled at her, and got his jaw broken.

blocks.text: Hey! You know I never told you how me and Jen met. I’m sure you can keep a secret.
We met a local bar ten or 15 minutes off planet from here. I was drowning in my sorrows. I saw her and walked up and sat down next to her.
I started to ramble about my woes. Ex wife, lost my job, Alaric’s birthday was coming up and I had no creds to my name.
She humored me and kept me company. All was good till I called her a nick name.
BAM! She slugged me to hard broke my jaw! She felt so bad carried my ass to a hospital. We been together since.

bubbles: Hey! You know I never told you how me and Jen met. I’m sure you can keep a secret.

I started to ramble about my woes. Ex wife, lost my job, Alaric’s birthday was coming up and I had no creds to my name.
She humored me and kept me company. All was good till I called her a nick name.
BAM! She slugged me to hard broke my jaw! She felt so bad carried my ass to a hospital. We been together since.

entries.title: Elves Part 2
entries.summary: Matthew earns the elves' trust by hunting a local bird with a bow.

blocks.text: You that elf planet I told you about? You know I had to do some trials with them to be able to use their boat?
They gave me a bow and told me I need to kill a wild animal. Never had done anything like that in my life!
It was an experience. I did it though! Shot some fat bird that was local there. They said after that I was allowed to use their boat and other tools.

bubbles: You that elf planet I told you about? You know I had to do some trials with them to be able to use their boat?

She was speechless. Completely speechless. That almost never happens.
It was the perfect day. You're a genius. You're a genius cat.

entries.title: The husband
entries.summary: Liam recounts Matthew bursting into a client meeting just to give Shadow flowers.

blocks.text: Frau Shadow’s husband decided it would be a ‘great’ idea to interrupt a meeting.
He just swung the door open and walked up and gave her flowers. He looked at our client and said.
“Opps! Sorry got to let the wife know I love her!” Then he walked right out of the room.
I don’t think the client was very amused. At least we didn’t lose the client.

entries.title: Eli
entries.summary: Liam admits Eli brought him to the café and describes her like a daughter he never had.

blocks.text: Eli is who told me about this place. She said I need to go relax some.
Eli… She’s special. She kinda like a daughter I didn’t have a chance to have.
She even had me walk her down the aisle for her wedding.
I’ll never understand her. But I do enjoy her company and her children’s.

entries.title: Grandkids
entries.summary: Eli's kids call Liam Grimmy and the weekly dinners have become something he looks forward to.

blocks.text: Eli dubbed me grandfather or also know as ‘grimmy’. To her children.
So her, Alaric and her kids come to the house once a week and eat dinner with me.
It’s nice to have a bit of a feeling of family again.

bubbles: Eli dubbed me grandfather or also know as ‘grimmy’. To her children.
So her, Alaric and her kids come to the house once a week and eat dinner with me.
It’s nice to have a bit of a feeling of family again.

entries.title: Nyvella
entries.summary: Liam was once engaged to a woman named Nyvella who died because of his best friend's mistake.

blocks.text: I was once engaged a century ago. Beautiful and intelligent woman.
Her name was Nyvella. But.. my best friend made a poor choice. Gave someone too much trust.
It lead to his death, his daughter’s and my fiance’s.
I still miss her.. it’s why I never tried to meet anyone else.

It lead to his death, his daughter’s and my fiance’s.
I still miss her.. it’s why I never tried to meet anyone else.

entries.title: Keeva
entries.summary: Liam speaks about his mentor Keeva — someone who saw through every excuse before he finished it.

blocks.text: My mentor's name was Keeva.
She was the one who trained me. Not just the fighting — everything.
She had a way of seeing through every excuse before you finished making it.
I haven't spoken to her in a very long time.
I don't need to. Some relationships you carry whether you talk or not.

She had a way of seeing through every excuse before you finished making it.
I haven't spoken to her in a very long time.
I don't need to. Some relationships you carry whether you talk or not.

entries.title: Revolia
entries.summary: Liam has a home planet he rarely visits.

blocks.text: I have a home planet. Revolia.
I left it a long time ago and I haven't been back often.
I'm sure both of my sister's hate me. I didn't come back when our parent's passed or when my brother was killed.
Today is my sisters's birthday. I guess only reason I brought it.

entries.title: What Fighters Are
entries.summary: Liam shares his philosophy on what makes someone worth training.

blocks.text: People think fighting is about strength.
It isn't.
It is about what you do in the half second after something goes wrong.
Some people freeze.
Some people panic.
The ones worth training? They make a choice. Even the wrong one. They choose.

It isn't.
It is about what you do in the half second after something goes wrong.
Some people freeze.
Some people panic.

entries.title: The Letter
entries.summary: Liam admits he has written and not sent a letter to his sister Riven for three years.

blocks.text: I have written my sister a letter.
50 years ago.
I have not sent it.
I keep thinking I'll find the right time.
Riven would tell me there is no right time.
She would be right.

50 years ago.
I have not sent it.
I keep thinking I'll find the right time.
Riven would tell me there is no right time.

entries.summary: Alfrin traveled two weeks by ship to be near his love and is waiting for the right moment.

blocks.text: I traveled 2 weeks by ship to come here. It was worth every second.
I just need to wait for the perfect time to surprise my love that I’m here.

bubbles: I traveled 2 weeks by ship to come here. It was worth every second.

entries.summary: Alfrin has seen the woman he came for in the café but is too nervous to approach her.

blocks.text: I have seen her a couple of times come into the cafe. I been too nervous to talk to her.
Her beauty is nothing that can be topped by anyone. Not even a clone could be as beautiful.

bubbles: I have seen her a couple of times come into the cafe. I been too nervous to talk to her.

blocks.text: I seen Jenny again today. I don’t think she saw me. She keeps hanging out with some man.
It’s ok she loves me more than anything in the universe. We used to be together.

I did what I had to do to keep her close.
People don't understand that kind of love. They call it control. They don't understand.
One day she'll remember what we had.

I told them I was just getting a coffee. I wasn't doing anything wrong.
I just want to see her.
She'll come around. She always does.

entries.title: How We Met
entries.summary: Alfrin describes meeting Jenny.

blocks.text: We met at a fight. She was so graceful as she fought in the tournment.
She was the most beautiful person I had ever laid eyes on.
I made sure to speak to her every day after that.
She seemed hesitant at first.
But she came around.
They always come around.

entries.title: What I Did For Her
entries.summary: Alfrin justifies controlling behavior as protection, fully believing his own version.

blocks.text: People said I was controlling.
I was protecting her.
There's a difference.
The people she was spending time with were not good for her.
I just made sure she understood that.
She understood eventually.

entries.title: Homework Corner
entries.summary: Alaric used to do homework in this building as a teen.

blocks.text: I used to sit in this exact spot as a teenager.
This used to be a different little shop. Sadly the owner passed away. No family so it was closed down for a while.
Then Grace bought it over, since then no once has been able to live up to her expectations.

entries.title: Property Law
entries.summary: Alaric explains that he is a lawyer. He works for his Stepmother.

blocks.text: I am a lawyer, who works for my step mother. Sounds a bit odd, but it works. Also better than beign a defense attorny. I did that for a while, clients are idiots.
Though I still do stuff here or there. Vanguard and Crimson Blade don't get into too much trouble. So kinda more on retainer for them.

entries.title: His Dad
entries.summary: Alaric talks about Matthew being a lot and admits he's come around to appreciating it.

blocks.text: My father is a lot. He always has been.
Growing up around that kind of energy is its own education.
*short pause*
He's also exactly what this place needed. I've come around to that.
Don't tell him — he'll immediately become forty percent louder.

entries.summary: Alaric has been watching old compound records and notes Liam appears in more of them than people know.

blocks.text: There are compound records going back decades.
Liam is in more of them than people know.
You watch enough of it and you understand why Shadow trusts him the way she does.
I haven't told him I've been watching.
I think he knows.

entries.title: The First Case
entries.summary: Alaric describes his first real case and how badly it went and what he learned from it.

blocks.text: My first case was a mess.
I was confident. Too confident.
I missed something obvious and it cost the client.
Not catastrophically. But enough.
I went back through every note I had written and found exactly where I stopped paying attention. Barly saved the case.
I have not stopped paying attention since.

entries.title: Ava and Zackery
entries.summary: Alaric talks about his kids and the specific ways they are already different from each other.

blocks.text: Zackery argues with everything.
Not rudely. He just needs to understand the reason behind every rule before he accepts it.
Ava is just quiet and accepts things.
I don't know which one is going to be harder to parent.
Eli says they both got it from me.
She means it as a compliment. I think.

entries.summary: You're easy to sit with.

blocks.text: Don't make it weird.

entries.title: Alaric
entries.summary: Eli explains how they first met.

blocks.text: Alaric and I met in a library. He was busy studying and I was…
Sorting books. He asked to chit chat with me, he knew who I was. So I was an utter ass to him.

bubbles: Alaric and I met in a library. He was busy studying and I was…
Sorting books. He asked to chit chat with me, he knew who I was. So I was an utter ass to him.

entries.title: Liam
entries.summary: Eli explains why she never gave up on Liam.

blocks.text: Working under Liam, everyone seemed to be scared of it. I could see past those walls.
My dad was that way with things. Liam reminded me a lot of my dad.
But something about his frequency seemed so alone. So.. I put on myself to push to be his friend.
I don't regret it. He is a great man even if he is closed off.

I don't regret it. He is a great man even if he is closed off.

entries.title: The Kids
entries.summary: Eli talks about Alaric and is issues with the kids.

blocks.text: So fun thing, my species can teleport. I'm sure you can imagine how having teleporting children would be, if you can't teleport.
Poor Alaric we had to get the kids watches so he can track them when they poof.
Oh he also has been teleported onto the in laws roof and left when my oldest got angry at his daddy. *laughs*

entries.title: Huthantus Memorial
entries.summary: Eli describes missing home and wishing her children could see it.

blocks.text: Nia and I are so far from home. I miss it, I wish my children could see our planet.
I wish we had pictures of home. We have so many photo albums there. I wonder if they all are destroyed
I hate the people who sold our planet. If I ever see one of them.. I promise they won't see tomorrow.
Don't tell my husband that. He is a lawyer and will lose his shit.

entries.title: Working On It
entries.summary: Eli acknowledges a rough stretch and says she is working on it, which costs her to say.

blocks.text: I had a rough stretch.
I'm not going into it.
I'll just say — I'm working on it.
That means something, coming from me.
It means I know it happened and I'm not pretending otherwise.

I'm not going into it.
I'll just say — I'm working on it.
That means something, coming from me.

entries.title: Grimmy
entries.summary: Eli made Liam walk her down the aisle and her kids call him Grimmy — he pretends to hate it.

blocks.text: I made Liam walk me down the aisle.
He didn't say a word about it — just showed up in something that wasn't black for the first time in probably a century.
My kids call him Grimmy.
He pretends he doesn't like it.
He likes it.

entries.title: The Entity

blocks.text: My entity doesn't have a name I use out loud.
She's been with me a long time.
She doesn't talk much.
When she does say something I listen.
She's been right every time.
I find that both reassuring and annoying.

entries.summary: Eli talks about her daughter and medical issues.

blocks.text: I have a little girl her name is Ava. Shes only 3.
She was born with a medical issue. Sadly we don't have the medical knowledge to help her.. Like we would had if my home planet wasn't enslaved.
We been trying to different doctors.. Neither of them have good options. But.. My daughter barely can be around me cause of it.

entries.title: Teleporting while pregnant
entries.summary: Eli explains some of the 'complications' when she was pregnant.

blocks.text: Fun fact when third trimester happens for my species. You can't teleport any more. It makes everything so weird.
But… the baby can teleport you.. Randomly. I got teleported into an alleyway before.
8 months pregnant in an alley while some idiot is robbing some lady.
Welp I stopped the robbery. Me and Katie have been friends sense!

entries.title: Ragnar
entries.summary: Nia wants to invite Ragnar to the café but is nervous about how people will react to an 8-foot orc.

blocks.text: Ugh, I want to have Ragnar come here and see the place. But I'm too nervous to ask him.
I know he might get weird looks. I mean.. 8 foot orc… and orcs have a very bad rap.
But Ragnar isn't like that! He is so sweet and he is the best cook!

entries.title: Crydles
entries.summary: Nia compares the cat to a crydle from Huthantus and confesses she once stole one for a night.

blocks.text: You know cats remind me of crydles. They are native to my home planet, Huthantus.

I wanted to have soo many of them. I mean they are seen as pest, but they are so cute. They are only seen as pest cause they eat crystals. Which course is how we power a lot of our tech.. well did power it.
My sister in law, their family had one as a pet. It's name was kuku!
I won't lie… I stole it one night.. only bad thing is the teleport.. so in the morning it was gone.

entries.title: Home
entries.summary: Nia misses home but can't return — Huthantus is occupied and her family is trapped there.

blocks.text: I miss home. I wish I could show Ragnar my home world.
Sadly my planet is now a slave planet… So I can't go home. My friends and family won't be free.
S-sorry.. I didn't mean to kill the mood.

I do not have a crush on Ragnar! I just go visit him each day, cause you know there's coffee in the kitchen.

blocks.text: I'm sure you have seen Eli and Alaric here. Eli is my older sister.
We talk every day on the phone. I go and try to visit her kids.
Though being a body guard to Shadow. Sometimes takes late nights if she has to go somewhere.

I can not get to them. I got word they are both still alive…
I miss my big brother, Tiger.

Like real ones. Not just the coffee excuse ones.
I don't know what to do with that.
I've never really had time for this kind of thing before.
Don't tell Eli. She will make signs.

entries.title: Huthanta Song
entries.summary: Nia teaches the cat a short Huthanta melody and explains what it means.

blocks.text: Let me teach you something.
This melody — it's called a carrying song.
You hum it when someone you love is far away.
It doesn't reach them.
But it means you haven't forgotten.
My mother hummed it every day. I think about that every time I hum it too.

entries.title: What Home Looks Like
entries.summary: Nia describes her home planet to the cat in careful detail.

blocks.text: Huthantus had these trees that grew in spirals.
Like they couldn't decide which way to go so they went every direction at once.
The air smelled different there. Sweeter.
The rivers ran teal because of the crystal sediment.
I can't go back.
But I remember every piece of it. I make sure of that.

The rivers ran teal because of the crystal sediment.
I can't go back.
But I remember every piece of it. I make sure of that.

Ok… I I might be ok.. ok right horrible at shifting clothes. But I make up for that in how good my forms are.

entries.title: Married

blocks.text: I know I look young, but I’m older than it looks. I am happily married!

He is a good man trying to make change. Lives adventurous life! Almost like from a story book. I been slowly getting to do more of the work!
